rules.name: fec_committee_name_match
rules.description: Donor gave to an FEC committee whose name matches a known Israel-aligned PAC pattern (NORPAC, JACPAC, Pro-Israel America, Democratic Majority for Israel / DMFI, Republican Jewish Coalition / RJC, Jewish Coalition, American Israel..., Christians United for Israel / CUFI, J Street, If Not Now), or contains both 'Israel' and ('PAC'|'Committee'|'Action Fund'). AIPAC (incl. United Democracy Project) and ADL Action are excluded.
